name: Accio
effect: Summons an object towards the caster.

name: Aguamenti
effect: Produces a jet of water from the caster's wand.

name: Alohomora
effect: Unlocks doors and other locked objects.

name: Avada Kedavra
effect: Causes instant death to the victim. One of the three Unforgivable Curses.

name: Crucio
effect: Inflicts excruciating pain on the victim. One of the three Unforgivable Curses.

name: Expecto Patronum
effect: Conjures a Patronus, a silvery phantom shape, usually an animal, which is the embodiment of the positive thoughts of the caster. Used to drive away Dementors.

name: Fiendfyre
effect: Conjures destructive, enchanted fire that mutates into monsters.

name: Imperio
effect: Places the victim completely under the caster's control. One of the three Unforgivable Curses.

name: Lumos
effect: Creates a narrow beam of light that shines from the wand's tip.

name: Morsmordre
effect: Conjures the Dark Mark in the sky.

name: Nox
effect: Turns off the light produced by Lumos.

name: Petrificus Totalus
effect: Used to temporarily bind the victim's body in a position much like that of a soldier at attention.

name: Protego
effect: The Shield Charm causes minor to strong jinxes, curses, and hexes to rebound upon the attacker.

name: Sectumsempra
effect: Violently wounds the target; described as being as though the subject had been slashed by a sword.
